message:
fix(fcp-cbor): reject NaN and Infinity floats during canonical CBOR serialization

Per RFC 8949 section 4.2.5, non-finite floats are not allowed in
canonical CBOR. Add NonFiniteFloat error variant and enforce the check
during value canonicalization in canonicalize_value_in_place().

Update six existing roundtrip tests that previously allowed Infinity,
NegInfinity, and NaN to assert correct rejection with NonFiniteFloat
error. Split vector test into clean-data test and separate rejection
test. Update all error-exhaustiveness test arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
